text.message: God I love your setup oj
I feel like first pick on this one was a trap
Blue, did you think I was taking 6 11 12?
I know...but then blue gets the whole middle
This is so slow for me
But I did it for the table.
true thats a lot of wheat for blue
It's gonna bounce between our 8 and our 6
Was just worried about blue going for the quick win
red you really should have taken road there
i probably will need help securing
i can plow blue here with this lol
Save it oj if you have it
Save the road...cause you may have to give it to red
Can I get one to build a road?
the fact neither of you have more than 1 knight played with your positions is pretty wild
Or I can just take it.
ill trade it for nb sure
Bro he is about to win
Because I can get it regardless
he just said he was going to take it...
next time make them play their knight first lol
ya he didn't give me nb which is cringe
otherwise they just tricked you into a free trade lmao
Good spot for me to lie
